description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a cylindrical neck and a wider, rectangular body. The bottle is predominantly gray with a large, black label on the front and back, featuring bold white text that reads 'BOURBON' and additional smaller text below. The label is bordered by a thin white line, giving it a classic, industrial look. The bottle appears to be made of plastic or glass, with a matte finish and no visible transparency. The cap is integrated into the neck and does not show any distinct separation, suggesting a screw cap or molded closure. There are no visible signs of damage, and the surface appears smooth and clean.
description: A tall, gray bottle with a black 'BOURBON' label and a smooth, matte finish. The bottle has a slender neck and a rectangular body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black 'BOURBON' label with white text and a clear view of the bottle's rectangular body.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's slender profile and the edge of the label, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a similar black label as the front, with the same rectangular body shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the bottle's narrow profile and the edge of the label.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large black label with white text reading 'BOURBON' and additional smaller text, bordered by a thin white line, placed on the front and back of the bottle.
